mapper.select: SELECT * FROM children WHERE user_id = #{user_id} AND is_active = TRUE ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO children ( user_id, first_name, last_name, birth_date, gender ) VALUES ( #{user_id}, #{first_name}, #{last_name}, #{birth_date}, #{gender} )
mapper.update: UPDATE children SET first_name = #{firstName}, last_name = #{lastName}, birth_date = #{birthDate}, gender = #{gender}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE child_id = #{childId} AND user_id = #{userId}
